api_key_sent_as_a_bearer_token_optional: API key sent as a Bearer token (optional for servers without auth)
base_url_of_the_temporal_server_s_http: Base URL of the Temporal server's HTTP API
bearer_token_leave_blank_for_servers_wit: Bearer token (leave blank for servers without auth)
connect_to_a_temporal_cluster_over_the_s: Connect to a Temporal cluster over the server's HTTP API to start workflow executions, send signals, run queries against workflow state, describe and list executions, fetch event histories, and cancel or terminate running workflows. API key only required for servers with authentication enabled.
cron_expressions_for_a_new_schedule_comm: Cron expressions for a new schedule (comma- or newline-separated)
decoded_memo_fields_attached_to_the_exec: Decoded memo fields attached to the execution
describe_a_failed_temporal_workflow_and_: Describe a failed Temporal workflow and pull its close event to explain why it failed.
describe_when_the_schedule_should_fire: Describe when the schedule should fire...
execution_status_running_completed_faile: Execution status (RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELED, TERMINATED, CONTINUED_AS_NEW, or TIMED_OUT)
fixed_interval_between_schedule_actions_: Fixed interval between schedule actions in seconds
history_event_filter_all_events_or_close: History event filter (all events or close event only)
iana_time_zone_for_cron_evaluation: IANA time zone for cron evaluation
json_object_of_search_attribute_values: JSON object of search attribute values
list_running_temporal_executions_and_sur: List running Temporal executions and surface long-running or stuck workflows.
maximum_executions_to_return_per_page: Maximum executions to return per page
maximum_history_events_to_return_per_pag: Maximum history events to return per page
maximum_schedules_to_return_per_page: Maximum schedules to return per page
name_of_the_query_handler_to_invoke: Name of the query handler to invoke
name_of_the_query_that_was_run: Name of the query that was run
name_of_the_signal_handler_to_invoke: Name of the signal handler to invoke
name_of_the_signal_that_was_sent: Name of the signal that was sent
name_of_the_update_handler_to_invoke: Name of the update handler to invoke
name_of_the_update_that_was_invoked: Name of the update that was invoked
notes_stored_on_a_new_schedule: Notes stored on a new schedule
number_of_events_in_the_workflow_history: Number of events in the workflow history
number_of_workflow_executions_matching_t: Number of workflow executions matching the query
overlap_policy_for_triggered_or_schedule: Overlap policy for triggered or scheduled actions
pending_activities_activityid_activityty: Pending activities (activityId, activityType, state, attempt, lastFailureMessage)
per_group_counts_when_the_count_query_us: Per-group counts when the count query uses GROUP BY
policy_for_reusing_a_closed_workflow_id: Policy for reusing a closed workflow ID
policy_when_a_workflow_with_the_same_id: Policy when a workflow with the same ID is already running
reason_recorded_in_the_workflow_history_: Reason recorded in the workflow history or schedule notes
recent_schedule_actions_scheduletime_act: Recent schedule actions (scheduleTime, actualTime, workflowId, runId)
recorded_in_the_workflow_history_or_sche: Recorded in the workflow history or schedule notes (optional)
run_id_targeting_a_specific_run: Run ID targeting a specific run
schedule_spec_calendars_intervals_cron_s: Schedule spec (calendars, intervals, cron strings, jitter, time zone)
send_a_signal_to_a_running_temporal_work: Send a signal to a running Temporal workflow and confirm it was delivered.
start_a_temporal_workflow_execution_with: Start a Temporal workflow execution with the right input and report the workflow and run IDs.
start_signal_query_and_manage_temporal_w: Start, signal, query, and manage Temporal workflow executions
targets_a_specific_run_defaults_to_the_l: Targets a specific run (defaults to the latest run)
task_queue_the_workflow_worker_polls: Task queue the workflow worker polls
token_for_the_next_page_of_results_list: Token for the next page of results (list and history operations)
token_from_a_previous_response_for_pagin: Token from a previous response (for pagination)
total_workflow_execution_timeout_in_seco: Total workflow execution timeout in seconds
type_of_pollers_to_list_workflow_or_acti: Type of pollers to list (workflow or activity)
whether_a_new_execution_was_started: Whether a new execution was started
whether_a_new_schedule_starts_paused_tru: Whether a new schedule starts paused ("true") or active (empty)
workers_polling_the_task_queue_identity_: Workers polling the task queue (identity, lastAccessTime, ratePerSecond)
workflow_executions_matching_the_list_fi: Workflow executions matching the list filter (workflowId, runId, workflowType, status, startTime, closeTime, executionTime, historyLength, taskQueue)
workflow_task_completed_event_id_to_rese: WORKFLOW_TASK_COMPLETED event ID to reset to
workflow_task_event_id_to_reset_to_e: Workflow task event ID to reset to, e.g. a WORKFLOW_TASK_COMPLETED event
